title: FY 2026 Justice Grants Supplemental Reentry Project Safe Neighborhood
description: This grant program provides funding to support juvenile and criminal justice-related services, including Project Safe Neighborhoods activities aimed at preventing, responding to, and reducing violent crimes through community engagement, prevention, intervention, and strategic enforcement.
eligibility_requirements: Applicants must be public or private, community-based non-profit agencies, organizations, or institutions.
Applicants must have an active System for Awards Management (SAM) registration and Unique Entity ID.
Applicants must hold a District business license and provide services or goods within the District.
For-profit organizations are eligible for local funding but may not include profit in their grant application.
For-profit organizations may participate as subcontractors to eligible agencies.
sdg_alignment: SDG 16: Peace, Justice, and Strong Institutions
